chunks.title: Introduction and Historical Context
chunks.reason: Establishes the prophet's lineage and the specific historical timeframe of his ministry.

chunks.title: Call to Prophecy
chunks.reason: Records the divine call, Jeremiah's objection, and God's commissioning with assurance.

chunks.title: Vision of Almond Tree and Boiling Pot
chunks.reason: Describes two symbolic visions confirming God's watchfulness and the coming judgment from the north.

chunks.title: Judgment and Assurance
chunks.reason: Details the invasion from the north, the people's sin, and God's promise of protection for the prophet.
